name: A.P. (DIR Series) Circular No. 19
summary: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has announced that Foreign Portfolio Investors (FPIs) are now permitted to invest in unlisted corporate debt securities, subject to certain conditions, as part of the expanded investment basket under the corporate bond route. The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has issued a circular allowing Foreign Portfolio Investors (FPIs) to invest in unlisted corporate debt securities and securitised debt instruments, with certain conditions.
